sentences.sentence: Muthukandiya is a village in Moneragala district, one of the drought-stricken areas in the "dry zone" of southern Sri Lanka, where half the country's population of 18 million lives.
sentences.translation: 穆图坎迪亚是莫内拉格勒区的一个村庄；该区位于斯里兰卡南部的“干旱地带”，是饱受旱灾的地区之一，全国1800万人口中有一半居住在这里。

structure.text: is a village in Moneragala district
one of the drought-stricken areas in the "dry zone" of southern Sri Lanka
where half the country's population of 18 million lives

difficult_points: one of... 是 Moneragala district 的同位语，补充说明该地区的性质与位置。
where 引导非限制性定语从句，指代前面的 dry zone，而不是紧邻的 southern Sri Lanka。

sentences.sentence: Rainfall in the area varies greatly from year to year, often bringing extreme dry spells in between monsoons.
sentences.translation: 这一地区的降雨量年际变化很大，季风雨季之间常常会出现极端干旱期。

structure.text: varies greatly from year to year
often bringing extreme dry spells in between monsoons

difficult_points: from year to year 表示逐年、年与年之间，强调降雨量的年际波动。
bringing... 是现在分词结果状语，说明降雨不稳定带来的后果。

sentences.sentence: But this drought was much worse than usual.
sentences.translation: 但这次旱灾比往常严重得多。
difficult_points: this drought 特指文章所讨论的这一次旱灾。
much 修饰比较级 worse，表示严重程度远超往常。

sentences.sentence: Despite some rain in November, only half of Moneragala's 1,400 tube wells were in working order by March.
sentences.translation: 尽管11月下过一些雨，到次年3月，莫内拉格勒的1400口管井仍只有一半能够正常使用。

structure.text: only half of Moneragala's 1,400 tube wells
were in working order by March

difficult_points: Despite 后接名词短语构成让步状语，不是从句。
by March 表示截至3月这一时间界限；in working order 意为可正常运转。

sentences.sentence: The drought devastated supplies of rice and freshwater fish, the staple diet of inland villages.
sentences.translation: 旱灾重创了稻米和淡水鱼的供应，而这两者正是内陆村庄的主食。

structure.text: devastated supplies of rice and freshwater fish
the staple diet of inland villages

difficult_points: the staple diet... 是 rice and freshwater fish 的同位语，说明二者对当地生活的重要性。
devastated 在此不是摧毁实物，而是指使食品供应遭受毁灭性打击。

sentences.sentence: Many local industries closed down and villagers headed for the towns in search of work.
sentences.translation: 许多当地产业停业，村民们纷纷前往城镇寻找工作。

structure.text: and villagers headed for the towns in search of work

difficult_points: and 连接两个并列结果：产业关闭和村民外出谋生。
in search of work 是介词短语作目的状语，说明前往城镇的原因。

sentences.sentence: The villagers of muthukandiya arrived in the 1970s as part of a government resettlement scheme.
sentences.translation: 穆图坎迪亚的村民于20世纪70年代迁来，是政府移民安置计划的一部分。

structure.text: as part of a government resettlement scheme

difficult_points: as part of... 说明这些村民迁来的政策背景，而不是表示身份比较。
muthukandiya 在源文此处以小写开头，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Each family was given six acres of land, with no irrigation system.
sentences.translation: 每户家庭获分六英亩土地，但没有配套的灌溉系统。

structure.text: was given six acres of land

difficult_points: was given 是双宾语结构 give somebody something 的被动形式。
with no irrigation system 补充说明分配土地时缺少的关键条件，中文需译出转折意味。

sentences.sentence: Because crop production, which relies entirely on rainfall, is insufficient to support most families, the village economy relies on men and women working as day-laborers in nearby sugar-cane plantations.
sentences.translation: 由于完全依赖降雨的农作物产量不足以维持大多数家庭的生计，村里的经济便依靠男女村民到附近的甘蔗种植园当日工来支撑。

structure.text: Because crop production, which relies entirely on rainfall, is insufficient to support most families
relies on men and women working as day-laborers in nearby sugar-cane plantations
working as day-laborers in nearby sugar-cane plantations

difficult_points: Because 引导原因状语从句，其中 which 从句插入修饰 crop production。
working... 是现在分词短语，说明 men and women 以何种方式支撑村庄经济。

sentences.sentence: Three wells have been dug to provide domestic water, but these run dry for much of the year.
sentences.translation: 村里挖了三口井来供应生活用水，但这些井一年中大部分时间都会干涸。

structure.text: Three wells have been dug to provide domestic water
but these run dry for much of the year

difficult_points: have been dug 是现在完成时的被动语态，表示挖井的结果延续到现在。
these 指代前面的 three wells；run dry 表示水源逐渐耗尽。

sentences.sentence: Women and children may spend several hours each day walking up to three miles (five kilometers) to fetch water for drinking, washing, and cooking.
sentences.translation: 妇女和儿童每天可能要花数小时，步行最多三英里（五公里），取回饮用、洗涤和做饭所需的水。

structure.text: may spend several hours each day
walking up to three miles (five kilometers)
to fetch water for drinking, washing, and cooking

difficult_points: spend time doing 构成固定结构，walking 是说明耗时活动的动名词。
to fetch water 是目的状语，for 后三个并列动名词说明水的用途。

sentences.sentence: In 1998, communities in the district discussed water problems with Practical Action South Asia.
sentences.translation: 1998年，该地区的各个社区与南亚实用行动组织讨论了用水问题。

structure.text: discussed water problems with Practical Action South Asia

difficult_points: communities 在此指当地多个社区及其居民，而不是抽象的共同体。
discuss A with B 表示与某方讨论某事，with 后是参与讨论的组织。

sentences.sentence: What followed was a drought mitigation initiative based on a low-cost "rainwater harvesting"technology already used in Sri Lanka and elsewhere in the region.
sentences.translation: 随后启动的是一项缓解旱灾的计划，该计划以一种低成本的“雨水收集”技术为基础；这项技术此前已在斯里兰卡及本地区其他地方使用。

structure.text: already used in Sri Lanka and elsewhere in the region

difficult_points: What followed 是 what 引导的主语从句，意为随后发生的事情。
源文在引号后的 technology 前缺少空格，按原文保留；already used... 过去分词短语修饰 technology。

sentences.sentence: It uses tanks to collect and store rain channeled by gutters and pipes as it runs off the roofs of houses.
sentences.translation: 这项技术利用水箱，收集并储存从屋顶流下、经檐槽和管道导入的雨水。

structure.text: uses tanks to collect and store rain
as it runs off the roofs of houses

difficult_points: It 指代上一句的 rainwater harvesting technology。
channeled... 修饰 rain；as 从句中的 it 也指雨水，说明雨水从屋顶流下的过程。

sentences.sentence: Despite an indigenous tradition of rain-water harvesting and irrigation systems going back to the third century BC, policy-makers in modern times have often overlooked the value of such technologies, and it is only recently that officials have taken much interest in household-level structures.
sentences.translation: 尽管当地收集雨水和建设灌溉系统的传统可追溯至公元前3世纪，现代政策制定者却常常忽视这类技术的价值，直到最近官员们才开始对家庭层面的设施产生浓厚兴趣。

structure.text: Despite an indigenous tradition of rain-water harvesting and irrigation systems going back to the third century BC
going back to the third century BC
policy-makers in modern times have often overlooked the value of such technologies
and it is only recently that officials have taken much interest in household-level structures
it is only recently that officials have taken much interest in household-level structures

difficult_points: Despite 后是含现在分词修饰语的长名词短语，整体表示让步。
it is only recently that... 是强调句，强调官员真正开始重视这一技术的时间很晚。

sentences.sentence: Government and other programmes have, however, been top-down in their conception and application, installing tanks free of charge without providing training in the skills needed to build and maintain them properly.
sentences.translation: 然而，政府及其他项目从构思到实施一直采用自上而下的方式：免费安装水箱，却没有提供正确建造和维护水箱所需的技能培训。

structure.text: have, however, been top-down in their conception and application
installing tanks free of charge without providing training
needed to build and maintain them properly

difficult_points: however 插在助动词与表语之间，表示与上一句形成转折。
installing... 是伴随状语；needed... 过去分词短语修饰 skills，them 指代 tanks。

sentences.sentence: Practical Action South Asia's project deliberately took a different approach, aiming to build up a local skills base among builders and users of the tanks, and to create structures and systems so that communities can manage their own rainwater harvesting schemes.
sentences.translation: 南亚实用行动组织的项目有意采取了另一种方式，旨在为水箱的建造者和使用者培养本地技能基础，并建立相应的组织架构和制度，使社区能够自行管理雨水收集计划。

structure.text: aiming to build up a local skills base among builders and users of the tanks
and to create structures and systems
so that communities can manage their own rainwater harvesting schemes

difficult_points: aiming... 是现在分词状语，解释 different approach 的具体目标。
to build up 与 to create 并列；so that 引导目的状语从句，说明建立制度的目的。

sentences.sentence: The community of Muthukandiya was involved throughout.
sentences.translation: 穆图坎迪亚社区全程参与了该项目。
difficult_points: was involved 是被动形式，但表达社区参与其中这一状态。
throughout 作副词，指从项目开始到结束的整个过程。

sentences.sentence: Two meetings were held where villagers analysed their water problems, developed a mitigation plan and selected the rainwater harvesting technology.
sentences.translation: 项目召开了两次会议，村民们在会上分析用水问题、制定缓解方案，并选定了雨水收集技术。

structure.text: where villagers analysed their water problems, developed a mitigation plan and selected the rainwater harvesting technology

difficult_points: where 引导定语从句修饰 meetings，相当于 at which，表示在会议上。
analysed、developed 和 selected 是三个并列谓语，共用主语 villagers。

sentences.sentence: Two local masons received several days' on-the-job training in building the 5,000-litre household storage tanks: surface tanks out of Ferro-cement and underground tanks out of brick.
sentences.translation: 两名当地泥瓦匠接受了数天的在岗培训，学习建造容量为5000升的家用储水箱，即用钢丝网水泥制成的地面水箱和用砖砌成的地下水箱。

structure.text: in building the 5,000-litre household storage tanks
surface tanks out of Ferro-cement and underground tanks out of brick

difficult_points: in building... 说明培训的内容；5,000-litre 是复合形容词，修饰 storage tanks。
冒号后列出两类水箱，out of 表示由某种材料制成。

sentences.sentence: Each system, including tank, pipes, gutters and filters, cost US$195 –equivalent to a month's income for an average village family.
sentences.translation: 每套系统（包括水箱、管道、檐槽和过滤器）造价195美元，相当于一个普通村民家庭一个月的收入。

structure.text: including tank, pipes, gutters and filters
equivalent to a month's income for an average village family

difficult_points: including... 是插入成分，列举一套系统所含部件。
破折号后的 equivalent... 补充说明195美元对普通家庭意味着什么；源文破折号后缺少空格，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Just over half the cost was provided by the community, in the form of materials and unskilled labour.
sentences.translation: 略高于一半的费用由社区承担，具体以材料和非技术劳动力的形式投入。

structure.text: in the form of materials and unskilled labour

difficult_points: Just over half 表示略多于一半，而不是恰好一半。
in the form of 说明社区并非全部支付现金，而是提供材料和劳动力。

sentences.sentence: Practical Action South Asia contributed the rest, including cement, transport and payment for the skilled labour.
sentences.translation: 其余部分由南亚实用行动组织承担，包括水泥、运输费用和技术工人的报酬。

structure.text: including cement, transport and payment for the skilled labour

difficult_points: the rest 指上一句中社区未承担的剩余成本。
including... 列举该组织承担成本的具体项目，transport 在此指运输费用。

sentences.sentence: Households learned how to use and maintain the tanks, and the whole community was trained to keep domestic water supplies clean.
sentences.translation: 各家各户学习了如何使用和维护水箱，整个社区还接受了保持生活用水清洁的培训。

structure.text: Households learned how to use and maintain the tanks
how to use and maintain the tanks
and the whole community was trained to keep domestic water supplies clean
to keep domestic water supplies clean

difficult_points: how to... 是疑问词加不定式结构，作 learned 的宾语。
keep + 宾语 + 形容词 clean 表示使生活用水保持清洁。

sentences.sentence: A village rainwater harvesting society was set up to run the project.
sentences.translation: 村里成立了一个雨水收集协会来负责项目运营。
difficult_points: was set up 是被动语态，表示该协会被成立。
to run the project 是目的状语，run 在此意为运营、管理。

sentences.sentence: To date, 37 families in and around Muthukandiya have storage tanks.
sentences.translation: 截至目前，穆图坎迪亚及其周边已有37户家庭配备了储水箱。
difficult_points: To date 表示截至目前，常与现在完成意义搭配。
in and around Muthukandiya 同时涵盖村内及村庄周边地区。

sentences.sentence: Evaluations show clearly that households with rainwater storage tanks have considerably more water for domestic needs than households relying entirely on wells and ponds.
sentences.translation: 评估清楚表明，装有雨水储存箱的家庭可用于日常生活的水，远多于完全依赖水井和池塘的家庭。

structure.text: that households with rainwater storage tanks have considerably more water for domestic needs than households relying entirely on wells and ponds
relying entirely on wells and ponds

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，承载评估得出的核心结论。
more...than... 比较两类家庭；relying... 修饰后一类 households。

sentences.sentence: During the driest months, households with tanks may have up to twice as much water available.
sentences.translation: 在最干旱的几个月里，装有水箱的家庭可用水量可能达到原来的两倍。

structure.text: may have up to twice as much water available

difficult_points: up to 表示最高可达到，说明两倍是上限而非所有家庭的固定数值。
twice as much water 是倍数表达，available 后置说明这些水可供使用。

sentences.sentence: Their water is much cleaner, too.
sentences.translation: 而且，他们的用水也干净得多。
difficult_points: Their 指代装有储水箱的家庭，而不是前文的水井和池塘。
much 修饰比较级 cleaner，too 表示清洁度是除水量之外的另一项优势。

sentences.sentence: Nandawathie, a widow in the village, has taken full advantage of the opportunities that rainwater harvesting has brought her family.
sentences.translation: 村里的寡妇南达瓦蒂充分利用了雨水收集给她一家带来的各种机会。

structure.text: has taken full advantage of the opportunities
that rainwater harvesting has brought her family

difficult_points: a widow... 是 Nandawathie 的同位语，补充其家庭背景。
that 引导定语从句修饰 opportunities；bring somebody something 表示给某人带来某物。

sentences.sentence: With a better water supply now close at hand, she began by growing a few vegetables.
sentences.translation: 如今有了近在手边的更充足水源，她先从种植少量蔬菜做起。

structure.text: With a better water supply now close at hand
began by growing a few vegetables

difficult_points: With + 名词 + 形容词短语构成伴随背景，说明她开始种菜的条件。
begin by doing 表示先从某件事做起；close at hand 意为就在近处、随手可得。

sentences.sentence: The income from selling these helped her to open a small shop on her doorstep.
sentences.translation: 出售这些蔬菜所得的收入帮助她在家门口开了一家小店。

structure.text: helped her to open a small shop

difficult_points: these 指代上一句的 vegetables。
help somebody to do 表示帮助某人做某事；on her doorstep 在此按字面指就在家门口。

expressions.meaning_zh: 通过做某事获得的收入

sentences.sentence: This increased her earnings still further, enabling her to apply for a loan to install solar power in her house.
sentences.translation: 这使她的收入进一步增加，从而让她能够申请贷款，在家中安装太阳能供电设备。

structure.text: enabling her to apply for a loan
to install solar power in her house

difficult_points: This 指前一句所说的开设小店这件事。
enabling... 是结果状语；后一个 to install... 说明申请贷款的目的。

sentences.sentence: She is now thinking of building another tank in her garden so that she can grow more vegetables.
sentences.translation: 她现在正考虑在自家园子里再建一个水箱，以便种植更多蔬菜。

structure.text: is now thinking of building another tank in her garden
so that she can grow more vegetables

difficult_points: think of doing 表示考虑做某事，building 是介词 of 的宾语。
so that 引导目的状语从句，说明再建水箱的用途。

sentences.sentence: Nandawathie also feels safer now that she no longer has to fetch water from the village well in the early morning or late evening.
sentences.translation: 南达瓦蒂现在也觉得更安全了，因为她不必再在清晨或深夜去村里的水井打水。

structure.text: now that she no longer has to fetch water from the village well in the early morning or late evening

difficult_points: now that 是复合连词，意为既然、由于，说明她感到更安全的原因。
no longer has to 表示不再必须做某事，并非禁止她去取水。

sentences.sentence: She says that her children no longer complain so much of diarrhoea.
sentences.translation: 她说，孩子们现在已经不再那么频繁地受腹泻困扰。

structure.text: that her children no longer complain so much of diarrhoea

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明她观察到孩子健康状况的变化。
complain of 在此不是抱怨某事，而是表示自诉患有某种病症。

sentences.sentence: And her daughter Sandamalee has more time for school work.
sentences.translation: 她的女儿桑达玛莉也有了更多时间做功课。

structure.text: has more time for school work

difficult_points: 句首 And 承接前文，补充雨水收集带来的另一项家庭收益。
Sandamalee 与 her daughter 构成同位关系，指明女儿的姓名。

sentences.sentence: In the short term, and on a small scale, the project has clearly been a success.
sentences.translation: 从短期和小规模实施的情况来看，这个项目显然是成功的。
difficult_points: In the short term 与 on a small scale 并列，限定成功结论的时间和范围。
has been a success 用名词 success 作表语，表示项目取得成功。

sentences.sentence: The challenge lies in making such initiatives sustainable and expanding their coverage.
sentences.translation: 真正的挑战在于使这类行动能够持续，并扩大其覆盖范围。

structure.text: lies in making such initiatives sustainable and expanding their coverage

difficult_points: lie in doing 表示关键或难点在于做某事。
making... 与 expanding... 是两个并列动名词短语；their 指 initiatives。

sentences.sentence: At a purely technical level, rainwater harvesting is evidently sustainable.
sentences.translation: 单从技术层面来看，雨水收集显然是可持续的。
difficult_points: At a ... level 用来限定评价角度，这里只讨论技术可持续性。
purely 强调该结论尚未涵盖后文的资金和组织问题。

sentences.sentence: In Muthukandiya, the skills required to build and maintain storage tanks were taught fairly easily and can be shared by the two trained masons, who are now finding work with other development agencies in the district.
sentences.translation: 在穆图坎迪亚，建造和维护储水箱所需的技能相当容易传授，而且可以由两名受过培训的泥瓦匠继续传播；他们现在也在该地区其他发展机构找到了工作。

structure.text: the skills required to build and maintain storage tanks
required to build and maintain storage tanks
were taught fairly easily and can be shared by the two trained masons
who are now finding work with other development agencies in the district

difficult_points: required... 是过去分词短语修饰 skills；were taught 与 can be shared 是并列的被动谓语。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 the two trained masons。

sentences.sentence: The non-structural elements of the work, especially it's financial and organizational, present a bigger challenge.
sentences.translation: 这项工作中的非工程性因素，尤其是财务和组织方面的问题，构成了更大的挑战。

structure.text: The non-structural elements of the work

difficult_points: non-structural 在此指技术设施以外的财务和组织管理因素。
it's 是源文语法异常，按语境应为 its financial and organizational elements，但原句按源文保留。

sentences.sentence: A revolving fund was set up, with households that had already benefited agreeing to contribute a small monthly amount to pay for maintenance, repairs and new tanks.
sentences.translation: 项目设立了一个循环基金，已经受益的家庭同意每月缴纳一小笔钱，用于维护、维修和添置新水箱。

structure.text: with households that had already benefited agreeing to contribute a small monthly amount
to pay for maintenance, repairs and new tanks

difficult_points: with + households + agreeing 构成独立结构，补充说明基金的筹资机制。
that 从句修饰 households；to pay for... 说明每月缴款的用途。

sentences.sentence: However, it appears that the revolving fund concept was not fully understood and it has proved difficult to get households to contribute.
sentences.translation: 然而，循环基金这一概念似乎并未得到充分理解，而且事实证明，要让各家各户缴款十分困难。

structure.text: that the revolving fund concept was not fully understood
and it has proved difficult to get households to contribute

difficult_points: 第一个 it 是形式主语，真正内容由 that 从句给出。
第二个 it 也是形式主语；get households to contribute 表示促使各家庭缴款。

sentences.sentence: Recovering costs from interventions that do not generate income directly will always be a difficult proposition, although this can be overcome if the process is explained more fully at the outset.
sentences.translation: 要从不能直接产生收入的干预项目中收回成本，始终会是一件难事；不过，如果一开始就更充分地解释这一运作过程，这个困难也可以克服。

structure.text: Recovering costs from interventions that do not generate income directly
that do not generate income directly
will always be a difficult proposition
if the process is explained more fully at the outset

difficult_points: Recovering... 是动名词短语作主语，其中 that 从句修饰 interventions。
although 引导让步从句，this 指收回成本这一难题；if 从句给出克服难题的条件。

sentences.sentence: The Muthkandiya initiative was planned as a demonstration project, to show that community-based drought mitigation through rainwater harvesting was feasible.
sentences.translation: 穆图坎迪亚的这项行动被规划为一个示范项目，用以证明通过雨水收集开展以社区为基础的旱灾缓解是可行的。

structure.text: was planned as a demonstration project
to show that community-based drought mitigation through rainwater harvesting was feasible
that community-based drought mitigation through rainwater harvesting was feasible

difficult_points: to show... 是目的状语，说明设立示范项目的目的；that 从句作 show 的宾语。
Muthkandiya 与前文 Muthukandiya 拼写不一致，是源文地名拼写异常，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: Several other organizations have begun their own projects using the same approach.
sentences.translation: 其他几个组织也已经采用同样的方法启动了各自的项目。
difficult_points: have begun 是现在完成时，说明示范项目已产生扩散效果。
using... 是现在分词状语，说明这些组织启动项目时采用的方法。

sentences.sentence: The feasibility of introducing larger tanks is being investigated.
sentences.translation: 引入更大型水箱的可行性正在接受评估。

structure.text: The feasibility of introducing larger tanks

difficult_points: of introducing... 是介词加动名词短语，具体说明所评估的可行性内容。
is being investigated 是现在进行时的被动语态，表示评估工作正在进行。

sentences.sentence: However, a lot of effort and patience are needed to generate the interest, develop the skills and organize the management structures needed to implement sustainable community-based projects.
sentences.translation: 然而，要激发参与兴趣、培养相关技能并建立实施可持续社区项目所需的管理架构，还需要投入大量努力和耐心。

structure.text: a lot of effort and patience
to generate the interest, develop the skills and organize the management structures
needed to implement sustainable community-based projects

difficult_points: are needed 是被动结构，to 后三个并列动词说明努力与耐心要用于哪些工作。
needed... 过去分词短语修饰 management structures，并在内部用不定式说明这些架构的用途。

sentences.sentence: It will probably be some time before rainwater harvesting technologies can spread rapidly and spontaneously across the district's villages, without external support.
sentences.translation: 在没有外部支持的情况下，雨水收集技术恐怕还需要一段时间，才能在全区各村迅速、自发地推广开来。

structure.text: It will probably be some time
before rainwater harvesting technologies can spread rapidly and spontaneously across the district's villages

difficult_points: It will be some time before... 是固定句型，表示还要过一段时间才会发生某事。
rapidly and spontaneously 并列修饰 spread；without... 强调自主扩散所缺少的外部条件。

expressions.text: it will be some time before
